title: Mekanism Lasers
description: This mod adds laser additions, such as laser stopper, laser tires, and so mutch more
body:
(NOTE: This mod is under development but it can be downloaded and used)

(NOTE: A lot of things are yet to be added)

Latest 1.21.1 version: 1.1.10.3-b-patch

Latest 1.21 version: 1.1.3

Lastest 1.20.1 version: 1.0.9

This mod cannot run without the Mekanism mod!

With this mod, you will get extra abilities with lasers, such as laser doors, security systems, and the ability to upgrade lasers from basic to ultimate tiers.

"Mekanism Lasers" is not just a security mod; with this mod, you can make an infinite ore generator!

Join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/FuuNQHqEPv

Please report any issues at https://github.com/Ominox0/mekanism_lasers/issues


For the best experience install both Jade and JEI



I highly recommend mod Mekanism Turrets & Fences by SkelMaximus, this mod is excellent if you want further protection of your base!
